title: DHWhiteFoliageFix
description: A simple mod that fixes the issue with white foliage occurring when using Distant Horizons in conjunction with mods such as Polytone and reconnecting to a server.
body: This is a simple mod to modify the way Distant Horizons looks up biomes to pass to the ColorResolver when determining BlockTints. This fixes the issue of biomes losing their colors and foliage in LODs becoming white when leaving and reconnecting to a server when Distant Horizons is used in conjunction with mods such as Polytone.
